task: TASK 31: Vercel deploy red #2 at commit 05cd40d (prod logs 17:17 and 17:23 no-cache retry, identical ERR_INVALID_THIS). RC PROVEN: PATH shadowing — corepack shims land in node's bin dir; Vercel provisions pnpm 6 earlier in PATH ('oldest available' rule, active because installCommand mentioned pnpm and no lockfile committed); bare `pnpm install` ran pnpm 6 on Node 24 → node-fetch ERR_INVALID_THIS on every registry GET. corepack itself worked in both failed builds ('Adding pnpm@11.5.1 to the cache...'). Fingerprints: 'Scope: all 2 workspace projects' (pnpm-6 default packages ** catching e2e/; pnpm-workspace.yaml has no packages field so pnpm 11 sees 1 project).
deliveredScope: vercel.json (2 lines): installCommand 'corepack install && corepack pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile'; buildCommand 'corepack pnpm run build' — corepack-prefixed invocation executes the packageManager-pinned 11.5.1 from corepack's cache regardless of PATH; 'corepack enable' dropped (proven not load-bearing: it succeeded on Vercel and the failure still occurred)

COREPACK_ENABLE_NETWORK=0 offline build-step proof), vercel-pipeline (docs cited: single container, full command overrides, vite preset auto outputDirectory dist, no api/ dir), e2e-repro (independent scripts)

Local rogue-PATH experiment: BARE_PNPM_RESOLVES_TO=6.35.1 vs COREPACK_PNPM_RESOLVES_TO=11.5.1 after identical corepack steps.
